raw_consumer_statement:
I bought flooring material from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, NV for {$7900.00} on XXXX XXXX. I cancelled the sale by informing the merchant and CitiCredit card on XX/XX/year>. My real estate broker informed me that the thickness of the flooring material isnt suitable for heavy foot traffic thats the reason I cancelled the transaction. 
I informed CitiCard I did not receive the materials so theres nothing to return. I sent several letters to Citi Card and informed it will be resolved by XX/XX/XXXX. I called early last week it will be resolved within 10 days as of XX/XX/XXXX I havent received any resolution to this issue. The total on the Citi Card including finance charges {$8200.00}. 
Im on social security I cant afford paying more than {$8000.00} for flooring materials I didnt receive.

Citi card case # XXXX
